---
title: "漫长的求证"
description: "长篇小说《漫长的求证》章节目录页，关于县城、物理、异乡与漫长求索。"
lang: zh-CN
image: "https://yuda-bi.com/files/novels/%E6%BC%AB%E9%95%BF%E7%9A%84%E6%B1%82%E8%AF%81.jpg"
image-alt: "《漫长的求证》封面"
open-graph:
  locale: zh_CN
  image-alt: "《漫长的求证》封面"
twitter-card:
  image-alt: "《漫长的求证》封面"
page-layout: custom
toc: false
css: ../../novels.css
---

::: {.novels-page}

::: {.novel-detail-hero}
::: {.novel-detail-hero-inner}
::: {.novel-detail-cover}
![漫长的求证](../../files/novels/漫长的求证.jpg){.cover-img}
:::
::: {.novel-detail-header}
[长篇小说 &middot; 三部十六章]{.novels-label-en}

# 漫长的求证 {.novel-detail-title}

[沉 &middot; 隧 &middot; 渠]{.novel-detail-subtitle}

::: {.novel-detail-synopsis}
傍晚起了风，她蹲在县城的水泥台阶上做题，他蹲在旁边替她挡风。后来劳燕分飞，纸页一翻，天便换了颜色。他带着那本卷了边的旧课本去了大洋彼岸，扉页上那行铅笔小字，成了此后所有公式的源头。
:::

[&larr; 返回小说列表](/novels.html){.novel-back-link}

:::
:::
:::

::: {.novels-content}

::: {.novel-toc-section}

::: {.novel-progress-note}
全书十六章正文已上线，可按章节顺序进入阅读。
:::

::: {.novel-part}
::: {.novel-part-header}
::: {.novel-part-number}
第一部
:::

## 沉 {.novel-part-title}
:::

::: {.novel-chapter-list}

::: {.novel-chapter .chapter-available data-href="chapter-01-fenbi/" role="link" tabindex="0" onclick="window.location.href=this.dataset.href" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();window.location.href=this.dataset.href;}"}
::: {.chapter-number}
一
:::
::: {.chapter-entry}
::: {.chapter-title}
[粉笔](chapter-01-fenbi/)
:::
::: {.chapter-teaser}
搬家时翻出的旧《统计物理》，把陆沉重新带回县城台阶上那一片被风吹白的夏天。
:::
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter .chapter-available data-href="chapter-02-jianbingtai/" role="link" tabindex="0" onclick="window.location.href=this.dataset.href" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();window.location.href=this.dataset.href;}"}
::: {.chapter-number}
二
:::
::: {.chapter-entry}
::: {.chapter-title}
[简并态](chapter-02-jianbingtai/)
:::
::: {.chapter-teaser}
实验班、水房电话与"简并态"的一句解释，让两个人之间的距离第一次有了清晰的轮廓。
:::
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter .chapter-available data-href="chapter-03-duanliu/" role="link" tabindex="0" onclick="window.location.href=this.dataset.href" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();window.location.href=this.dataset.href;}"}
::: {.chapter-number}
三
:::
::: {.chapter-entry}
::: {.chapter-title}
[断流](chapter-03-duanliu/)
:::
::: {.chapter-teaser}
图书馆靠窗的位置空着两个，他把书放下；从下午两点半开始，他给她打了十七个电话。
:::
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter .chapter-available data-href="chapter-04-kaifangxitong/" role="link" tabindex="0" onclick="window.location.href=this.dataset.href" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();window.location.href=this.dataset.href;}"}
::: {.chapter-number}
四
:::
::: {.chapter-entry}
::: {.chapter-title}
[开放系统](chapter-04-kaifangxitong/)
:::
::: {.chapter-teaser}
普里戈金那本旧书被风掀开，他在熵增旁边添了第一句自己的回应：因为系统是开放的。
:::
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter .chapter-available data-href="chapter-05-du/" role="link" tabindex="0" onclick="window.location.href=this.dataset.href" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();window.location.href=this.dataset.href;}"}
::: {.chapter-number}
五
:::
::: {.chapter-entry}
::: {.chapter-title}
[渡](chapter-05-du/)
:::
::: {.chapter-teaser}
出发那天父亲在车站门口替他买了一瓶水却没递出去；飞机抬头时，他翻到课本封底那行铅笔字。
:::
:::
:::

:::
:::

::: {.novel-part-divider}
:::

::: {.novel-part}
::: {.novel-part-header}
::: {.novel-part-number}
第二部
:::

## 隧 {.novel-part-title}
:::

::: {.novel-chapter-list}

::: {.novel-chapter .chapter-available data-href="chapter-06-xinhaoyuzaosheng/" role="link" tabindex="0" onclick="window.location.href=this.dataset.href" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();window.location.href=this.dataset.href;}"}
::: {.chapter-number}
六
:::
::: {.chapter-entry}
::: {.chapter-title}
[信号与噪声](chapter-06-xinhaoyuzaosheng/)
:::
::: {.chapter-teaser}
异国超市自助结账机、第一次 Zoom 面试、桌角四道月牙形小坑——他被礼貌地拨回属于自己的那一格。
:::
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter .chapter-available data-href="chapter-07-xianyan/" role="link" tabindex="0" onclick="window.location.href=this.dataset.href" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();window.location.href=this.dataset.href;}"}
::: {.chapter-number}
七
:::
::: {.chapter-entry}
::: {.chapter-title}
[先验](chapter-07-xianyan/)
:::
::: {.chapter-teaser}
从赵启维的合影墙到周教授办公室那盘薄荷糖，三种华人面孔同一种逻辑，把他一次次温柔地放回更低的位置。
:::
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter .chapter-available data-href="chapter-08-baobing/" role="link" tabindex="0" onclick="window.location.href=this.dataset.href" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();window.location.href=this.dataset.href;}"}
::: {.chapter-number}
八
:::
::: {.chapter-entry}
::: {.chapter-title}
[薄冰](chapter-08-baobing/)
:::
::: {.chapter-teaser}
异国冬天里三段越来越薄的关系，最后一颗番茄被切开，籽排成一个近乎对称的安静图案。
:::
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter .chapter-available data-href="chapter-09-kuangyezhongdedeng/" role="link" tabindex="0" onclick="window.location.href=this.dataset.href" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();window.location.href=this.dataset.href;}"}
::: {.chapter-number}
九
:::
::: {.chapter-entry}
::: {.chapter-title}
[旷野中的灯](chapter-09-kuangyezhongdedeng/)
:::
::: {.chapter-teaser}
一封不带 capacity、也不带 not the right fit 的短回信，把他从一长串模板拒绝里拽起来。
:::
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter .chapter-available data-href="chapter-10-jixian/" role="link" tabindex="0" onclick="window.location.href=this.dataset.href" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();window.location.href=this.dataset.href;}"}
::: {.chapter-number}
十
:::
::: {.chapter-entry}
::: {.chapter-title}
[基线](chapter-10-jixian/)
:::
::: {.chapter-teaser}
第一次组会被一句"What's your baseline?"拦在半空；Kevin 抽屉里露出半截写着 Phase Transitions 的旧本子。
:::
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter .chapter-available data-href="chapter-11-anwuzhi/" role="link" tabindex="0" onclick="window.location.href=this.dataset.href" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();window.location.href=this.dataset.href;}"}
::: {.chapter-number}
十一
:::
::: {.chapter-entry}
::: {.chapter-title}
[暗物质](chapter-11-anwuzhi/)
:::
::: {.chapter-teaser}
三次失败把他一寸寸往下拽。一个雪夜，Whitmore 也坐到地上，讲起七十年代末那篇等了三十年的旧论文。
:::
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter .chapter-available data-href="chapter-12-xiangbian/" role="link" tabindex="0" onclick="window.location.href=this.dataset.href" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();window.location.href=this.dataset.href;}"}
::: {.chapter-number}
十二
:::
::: {.chapter-entry}
::: {.chapter-title}
[相变](chapter-12-xiangbian/)
:::
::: {.chapter-teaser}
他不再盯着最大那一根特征值。当最后一行条件落到白板上，他突然明白知秋的死也是同一种逻辑。
:::
:::
:::

:::
:::

::: {.novel-part-divider}
:::

::: {.novel-part}
::: {.novel-part-header}
::: {.novel-part-number}
第三部
:::

## 渠 {.novel-part-title}
:::

::: {.novel-chapter-list}

::: {.novel-chapter .chapter-available data-href="chapter-13-sanpiao/" role="link" tabindex="0" onclick="window.location.href=this.dataset.href" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();window.location.href=this.dataset.href;}"}
::: {.chapter-number}
十三
:::
::: {.chapter-entry}
::: {.chapter-title}
[三票](chapter-13-sanpiao/)
:::
::: {.chapter-teaser}
稿件投出之后的等待与三份审稿意见。Appendix B 那半页，他按下 Delete 又撤销，最后一字未改。
:::
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter .chapter-available data-href="chapter-14-guren/" role="link" tabindex="0" onclick="window.location.href=this.dataset.href" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();window.location.href=this.dataset.href;}"}
::: {.chapter-number}
十四
:::
::: {.chapter-entry}
::: {.chapter-title}
[故人](chapter-14-guren/)
:::
::: {.chapter-teaser}
会议中心的 poster 区，赵启维在右下角那张小图前停了八到十秒——那是一次沉默的确认。
:::
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter .chapter-available data-href="chapter-15-xinjinhuochuan/" role="link" tabindex="0" onclick="window.location.href=this.dataset.href" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();window.location.href=this.dataset.href;}"}
::: {.chapter-number}
十五
:::
::: {.chapter-entry}
::: {.chapter-title}
[薪尽火传](chapter-15-xinjinhuochuan/)
:::
::: {.chapter-teaser}
接收邮件来的那个普通下午，他一个人吃了一碗面。书翻到第三十七页那行旧字旁边，多年以后写上一句新的回声。
:::
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter .chapter-available data-href="chapter-16-yuantou/" role="link" tabindex="0" onclick="window.location.href=this.dataset.href" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();window.location.href=this.dataset.href;}"}
::: {.chapter-number}
十六
:::
::: {.chapter-entry}
::: {.chapter-title}
[源头](chapter-16-yuantou/)
:::
::: {.chapter-teaser}
回县城，去黎家，去墓地。最后一段从一个外人的视角写下：很多年以后，我在一所大学走廊里第一次见到陆沉。
:::
:::
:::

:::
:::

:::

:::

::: {.novels-footer}
::: {.novels-footer-inner}
"章名并排搁着，前后遥遥照应，草蛇灰线，伏脉千里。"
:::
:::

:::
